usageChecks.summary: Local Vercel CLI usage lookup failed in this session, so fresh billing usage could not be confirmed here. Current production deployment readiness was confirmed via Vercel MCP, and the latest same-day successful usage check before QA-20260416-0297 remained normal.
usageChecks.evidence: node scripts/check-vercel-usage.js (CLI unavailable in current environment); mcp__vercel__.getDeployments(app=openmanager-ai,target=production,limit=3)

notes: Landing body text on production v8.11.16 no longer contains the previous best-effort guidance copy.
AI sidebar welcome text reads 서버 운영 질문을 빠르게 분석하고 조치안까지 연결합니다 and the input placeholder reads 서버 운영 질문을 입력하세요.
Stored client preference kept response mode at Thinking during this session, and the starter prompt still completed successfully through the queued production path.
The returned summary reported 15 total servers, 14 normal, 1 warning, 0 critical, 0 offline; average CPU 38%, memory 44%, disk 38%.
Analysis basis summary exposed 도구: 서버 메트릭 조회 · 모드: Thinking · 기간: 최근 1시간.
Console capture reported Total messages: 0 (Errors: 0, Warnings: 0).
